title: commonbrain lesson
description: Frozen contract for a single public coding lesson. Mirrors the private second-brain shape (id/date/title/tags/triggers/rule) plus public provenance fields. Length caps + single-line + no-control-char patterns are part of the prompt-injection defense (Pillar 0): they shrink the surface a malicious lesson can use to smuggle instructions into an agent's context.

id.description: Stable kebab-case slug, unique across the corpus. Also the DB primary key and the lessons/<id>.json filename.

html_path.description: Optional repo-relative path to the HTML explain layer.

title.description: One-line human title. Single line, no control characters.

rule.description: One actionable advisory line. NOT a runnable command. Single line, no control characters; capped to limit injection surface.

triggers.description: LITERAL error strings / concrete symptoms a future agent would grep (recall key). Single line each, no control characters.

provenance.description: promoted = generalized from a private brain by its owner; contributed = external PR.

contributor.description: GitHub handle of the PR author; null for seed content.

license.description: Content license (SPDX-style). Fixed to the repo default.

verified.description: Whether the rule has been reproduced/confirmed. Defaults to false (unverified) until a maintainer checks it.
